zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie Catherine de Crequy於1121年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基時，她的父親Gerard de Créquy42歲，母親Yolande Hainaut41歲。她於1136年與Jehan de Rollancourt在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1168年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie Catherine de Crequy于1121年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基时，她的父亲Gerard de Créquy42岁，母亲Yolande Hainaut41岁。她于1136年与Jehan de Rollancourt在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1168年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crequy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catharine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie Catherine de Crequy was born in 1121, in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Gerard de Créquy, was 42 and her mother, Yolande Hainaut, was 41. She married Jehan de Rollancourt in 1136, in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1168, in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie Catherine de Crequy est née en 1121, à Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Gerard de Créquy, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Yolande Hainaut, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Jehan de Rollancourt en 1136, à Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1168, à Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie Catherine de Crequy 1121 in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerard de Créquy 42 und ihre Mutter Yolande Hainaut 41. Sie hat 1136 in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Jehan de Rollancourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1168 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Catherine de Crequy è nata il nel 1121 nel Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Gerard de Créquy, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Yolande Hainaut, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Jehan de Rollancourt nel 1136, nel Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1168, nel Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie Catherine de Crequyが1121年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスクルeクイで生まれた時，父Gerard de Créquyは42歳，母Yolande Hainautは41歳であった。1136年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスクルeクイでJehan de Rollancourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1168年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスロランコウルトで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie Catherine de Crequy(이)가 1121년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 크e크이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerard de Créquy(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande Hainaut(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1136년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 크e크이에서 Jehan de Rollancourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1168년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 롤랭쿠르트에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Catherine de Crequy nasceu em 1121, em Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Gerard de Créquy, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Yolande Hainaut, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Jehan de Rollancourt em 1136, em Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1168, em Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie Catherine de Crequy родилась в 1121 г. в местности крeкуи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Gerard de Créquy было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Yolande Hainaut, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jehan de Rollancourt в 1136 г. в местности крeкуи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1168 г. в местности ролланкоурт, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie Catherine de Crequy nació en 1121, en Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Gerard de Créquy, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Yolande Hainaut, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Jehan de Rollancourt en 1136, en Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1168, en Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 47 años.
